push.name: Push to GitHub
push.description: Triggers a manual backup to the configured GitHub repository immediately.

user.title: Configure GitHub Backup
user.description: Enter your GitHub repository details to automatically backup your Home Assistant configuration.

backup_failed.title: GitHub Backup Failed
backup_failed.description: The integration could not push the configuration to GitHub. This might be due to an expired Personal Access Token, a Merge Conflict, or a network issue. Check the Home Assistant logs for more details.
